rationale: No conflict. The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Gov't Code §2306.1231, which governs use of the federal poverty line for department-administered program eligibility.
quote: The department shall use the applicable federal poverty line in determining eligibility for each federal or state program administered by the department that requires poverty instead of area median income to be used as a criterion of program eligibility.
_note: Rule text concerns TDHCA poverty-line eligibility criteria; no overlap with property tax homestead exemption amounts.
